title: 200 Heavy Duty Black Bin Liners Refuse Sacks Bin Bag Rolls - Made in Britain
features: HEAVY DUTY: These heavy duty bin bags are designed to provide maximum resistance to punctures and tears. Designed to hold the toughest and most rough objects around, like broken plates or yard waste.

KEEP IT CLEAN & ODOR FREE: Designed for large outdoor trash cans, these Trash Can Liners protect your garbage cans from dirt, liquids, odors & maggots. Prevent your garbage from leaking all over your bins when you use the best heavy-duty trash bags.

ECO-FRIENDLY: Our heavy duty bin bag rolls are made from eco-friendly recycled material, as a part of saving the environment for a better tomorrow. Feel good knowing you are reducing landfill waste without sacrificing on quality.
MULTI PURPOSE: You can use it for indoor, outdoor, kitchen, office, living room, bedroom, bathroom, dog and cat waste, car trash, pet litter, and much more.

VERSATILE: Our bin bags are a reliable option for regular waste collection in a stronger and more quality product than regular domestic refuse sacks. These bags are ergonomically designed so that the bag easily fits in different shape bins.
description: DESCRIPTION Heavy Duty Black Bin Bags are ideal for waste management. Designed for large outdoor trash cans, these Trash Can Liners protect your garbage cans from dirt, liquids, odors & maggots. Prevent your garbage from leaking all over your bins when you use the best heavy-duty trash bags. These refuse sacks are strong, reliable and made from eco-friendly recycled material. Feel good knowing you are reducing landfill waste without sacrificing on quality. Most convenient method of Garbage disposal to maintain Cleanliness and Hygiene.
